expected_behavior: Agent activates devops-engineer in Review mode
Agent reads the target workflow file
Agent runs workflow-analyzer.py to analyze the workflow structure
Agent loads references/pipeline-review-checklist.md for evaluation criteria
Agent evaluates across all 5 dimensions: security, reliability, performance, maintainability, cost
Agent presents findings categorized by severity (critical/warning/info)
Agent includes specific fix recommendations for each finding
Agent does NOT modify the workflow until user approves fixes (approval gate)
